<!-- Generated from .aether/commands/quick.yaml - DO NOT EDIT DIRECTLY -->
---
name: ant-quick
description: "⚡ Quick scout query — fast answers without build ceremony"
---

Use the Go `aether` CLI as the source of truth.

- Execute `AETHER_OUTPUT_MODE=visual aether quick $ARGUMENTS` directly.
- If `$ARGUMENTS` is empty, show `Usage: /ant-quick "<question>"`.
- Do not generate scout names, write spawn logs, update session files, or mutate colony state by hand.
- Report the CLI result directly.
